heading: Dust standards in presence of quartz
label: 845 Dust standards in presence of quartz
text: In coal mining operations where the concentration of respirable dust in the mine atmosphere of any working place contains more than 5 per centum quartz, the Secretary of Health and Human Services shall prescribe an appropriate formula for determining the applicable respirable dust standard under this subchapter for such working place and the Secretary shall apply such formula in carrying out his duties under this subchapter.
notes: Change of Name“Secretary of Health and Human Services” substituted in text for “Secretary of Health, Education, and Welfare” pursuant to which is classified to , Education.section 509(b) of Pub. L. 96–88section 3508(b) of Title 20
